note: Read-only daily checks the TrustSquare loop runs after Phase-1 sensing. THIS file is the mutable layer: future automation adds/edits checks HERE (agent-writable) and never touches the read-only SKILL.md. SAFETY CONTRACT: only entries with type=='read-only' are ever executed, and the runner NEVER deploys/pushes — it only senses and reports. A check command MUST accept --json and print one JSON object with at least a 'status' and a 'line' field.

checks.desc: Local build files ahead of what is served live (run /ship).
